recommended_actions.action: Investigate duplicate records. Add dedup logic keyed on non-key fields.
Fix null values in required column 'merchant_id' at the source.
Investigate root cause of fee_revenue discrepancy for 2025-12. Check for duplicate events, missing data, or filter logic differences.

top_risks.business_impact: P&L showed $299K in fee revenue — actual is $274K. $25K phantom revenue on regulatory filings constitutes a material misstatement
top_risks.title: fee_revenue misreported for 2025-12 (off by +8.4%)

top_risks.business_impact: 54 duplicate transaction records inflating fee calculations and distorting merchant reconciliation
top_risks.title: Near-duplicate rows detected

top_risks.business_impact: 28 transactions missing merchant_id — cannot reconcile these fees to merchants or verify compliance
top_risks.title: Null values in required column: merchant_id

executive_summary: BayesIQ audits a fintech company's transaction fee revenue pipeline across merchant reconciliation, fee calculations, and regulatory reporting. The audit identifies 3 findings — including 54 near-duplicate transaction records, null merchant IDs breaking downstream aggregations, and an 8.4% fee revenue overstatement constituting a material misstatement. After remediation, the reliability score improves from 33 to 81.
